news.title: Intel earnings and lower oil prices lift hopes for Wall Street rebound: Dow Jones, S&P, Nasdaq, Futures

news.title: 1 Healthcare Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 Facing Headwinds
news.description: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Shareholders who bet on the industry have been rewarded lately as healthcare stocks have returned 9.7% over the past six months, topping the S&P 500 by 1.8 percentage points.
